name: Oola - Thicc Alien Abductor but AGAIN
description:
"Freaky Grandma"

- A video title on MoistCr1TiKaL Gaming

Now, this isn't strictly an Oola bot. There is a second written scenario where you've been taken to Yehroit to be given away as basically an auction lot being sold to random Rirzans for people who want to experience the Rirzans other than Oola. There's also a blank scenario so you can input your own. It would be more complete if you stick with Oola, but they'll all work. Of course, like the original Oola, you will be owned by a Rirzan for one reason or another, so expect petplay stuff.

Also, I've expanded and retconned some things from the original Oola. For one, they're not a female-only species anymore. There are male Rirzans now, but for a reason unknown to even themselves, Rirzans can't breed amongst each other. This does means they still have to seek out other species to breed with like they did originally. As for expanding, the lorebook now contains both Rirzan history, biology, and the makeup of the planet. Rirzans live in the planet's unimaginably huge caves complexes because the planet is slightly too close to its star, leading to the surface being uninhabitable. The caves get just enough sunlight to flourish, leading to all Rirzan infrastructure being underground.

I'm happy to finally make this girly again. Alienpoosy's art has been on my list of things to write about for a while, but no SFW enough art has really been present.
creator: The Blevinator
